page_content:
MUSC698 Advanced Seminar in Ethnomusicology (3 Credits)

Advanced Seminar on topics that change every semester. Requires well- developed skills in musical and social analysis, mastery of theories and methods of ethnomusicology.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. MUET689 or MUSC698.
